para_trans: Member-wise devolution of budgetary provision approved under Head of Accounts 4515 0012 for the financial year 2025-26 MLA Local Development Programme.
Reference: - 1) Department of Planning, Government Decisions, No. 12.7.2016 2) Department of Finance, Government of India Circular No. 07/04 /2025.
3) Planning Department, Government Memorandum No. Statement - 0925 / P.No. 131 / Ka. 9482, D. 04/11/2025.
4) Planning Department, Government Memorandum No. Statement - 0925 / Q. No. 131 / Ka. 1482, D. 27/01/2026.
5) Planning Department, Government Decision No. Statement - 0925 / Q. No. 131 / Ka. 1482, D. 30/01/2026.
6) Planning Department, Government Memorandum No. Statement - 0925 / P.No. 131 / Ka. 9482, D. 24/02/2026.

The "Maharashtra Appropriation Bill, 2025" has been passed with the assent of the Governor of Maharashtra vide Maharashtra Act No. The Government of Maharashtra Gazette Extraordinary Part-IV, dated 31st March, 2025, has therefore been published. The Department of Finance, No. The authority to disburse funds under the programme is vested in the administrative department by a circular here. Accordingly, the funds made available by the Finance Department under the head MLA Local Development Programme "45150012" (53 - Major Constructions), vide reference No. It has been distributed to all the districts as per the Government Memorandum / Decision from 3rd to 6th. Reference No. Under the MLA Local Development Programme, funds have been distributed to the members of the Legislative Assembly of Pune district on the STA computer system developed for the MLA Local Development Programme.

A total of 318 members of the Legislative Assembly, including 266 members of the Legislative Assembly and 52 members of the Legislative Council, have been provided with a total of Rs. 63600.00 Lakhs (Rs.636 crores only) are being disbursed as indicated in the accompanying letter and the funds are being placed under the control of the respective District Collectors.

2. The District Collector and Member Secretary, District Planning Committee constituted the Planning Department, Government Decision No. Post Office - 0616 / P.No.96 / Ka. Subject to the provisions of section 1482, dated 12th July, 2016, further disbursement of this fund shall be made forthwith. Also, out of this fund, the expenditure on the items sanctioned from time to time under the MLA Local Development Programme should be met from the provision available in the next accounting year under the heading 2025-26.
4515- Other Village Development HAHA Capital Expenditure,
3. With reference to Finance Department No. 2 Government Circular Finance Department, Government Circular No.
Finance-2025 / Q. No.44 / Finance-3, D. Provided to administrative departments under 07/04/2025
The decision is being issued by the government.

67 of the Government of Maharashtra. 19. 191959. 1119.7090. The government decision has been made available on this website with the code 202603241547554116. The government decision is being digitally signed.
